description: End timed match early when participant reaches 100% accuracy
context:
Beads description:
When a participant achieves 100% accuracy in a timed battle, the match should end early rather than waiting for the timer to expire. This rewards perfect solutions and keeps the game moving. Implementation should: detect when any participant's hax reaches 100% match score, trigger battle end for all participants, and transition to the recap/voting phase.
